articles.title: Core Scientific Secures $54M Investment from Crypto Lender Celsius
articles.description: The global crypto yield-earning platform Celsius Network is pressing ahead with a $200 million commitment towards clean bitcoin (BTC) mining. Part of which has involved a $54 million investment in Core Scientific, a leading figure in carbon-neutral mining.
